🔬 Body-Version-Drift Linter · #2599 (P2)

CI gate: a skill's body must mention a version that reaches its upstream-version-tested pin. The back-half of the pair — check-labs-versions.mjs watches the pin (vs npm); this watches the body (vs the pin).
The rule: a skill is stale when the highest 0.x version token in its body is behind the pin. Higher minor anywhere → OK. Pin's minor with a patch-agnostic 0.29.x → OK (covers any patch). Only minor/major drift fails; patch precision is relaxed for .x. Legit "New in 0.5.0" changelog lines pass — the body just has to mention the current version somewhere.

📋 The 7 pinned skills (live verdicts)

Skillpackagepinbody maxverdict
All green after this PR. Before it, mcp-visual-output (0.15) and multi-surface-render (0.17) were red — the linter caught body rot that #2605 didn't reach.

🎛️ Try it — drag the body version against a pin

Self-contained, no-CDN playground · tests/skills/structure/test-upstream-version-drift.mjs · wired into npm run test:skills · Closes #2599
